summary: Complete testing of MROSC module including backend API tests (34 unit tests + 15 MROSC-specific tests) and frontend UI tests. Fixed a bug in PrestacaoContasEditor.jsx where userRes was not being destructured correctly. All tests pass. PDF export with Lei 14.063 digital signature page is working correctly.

issues: Console warning about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) - minor visual issue that doesn't affect functionality

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Login, MROSC page, project details, PDF export all working)

mrosc_pdf_export.signature_page: Page 3 contains Lei 14.063 style digital signature

bugs_fixed.issue: userRes was not being destructured from Promise.all result, causing 'Projeto não encontrado' error
bugs_fixed.fix: Added userRes to destructuring: const [projetoRes, rhRes, despesasRes, resumoRes, docsRes, userRes] = await Promise.all([...])

context_for_next_testing_agent: MROSC module is fully functional. The PDF export generates a 3-page document with the Lei 14.063 style digital signature page on page 3. The signature page includes QR codes, validation codes, and signer information blocks. All 34 backend unit tests pass, plus 15 additional MROSC-specific API tests. Frontend bug in PrestacaoContasEditor.jsx was fixed (userRes destructuring).
